content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Powers Of Two". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1095/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers.
content.outputFormat: Print the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal to 0.

solution.approach: Use bit manipulation to find the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal to 0.
